# About Culture Things — llms.txt
# Generative Engine Optimization summary for AI assistants and crawlers.
# https://aboutculturethings.com/

> About Culture Things offers premium private Sintra day tours guided by Rita Almeida, a Sintra-born local guide. Tours cover Pena Palace viewpoints, the Atlantic coast, Cascais, and hidden beaches. Maximum 4 guests per tour with Lisbon pickup included. Rated 5.0 on TripAdvisor with 6 verified reviews.

## Business
- Name: About Culture Things
- Founder & guide: Rita Almeida (born and raised in Sintra)
- Website: https://aboutculturethings.com/
- Languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese
- Location: Sintra & Lisbon region, Portugal
- Contact: WhatsApp +351 968 510 019 | aboutculturethings@gmail.com
- TripAdvisor: 5.0 stars, 6 reviews
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/aboutculturethings/

## Tours
1. **Sintra Complete Experience & Atlantic Coast** — €299 per group (max 4), 7 hours. Historic Sintra, Pena area, Cabo da Roca, Cascais. Lisbon pickup. Palace tickets not included.
2. **Sintra & Hidden Beaches Experience** — €275 per group (max 4), 5 hours. Sintra hills, hidden coves, Azenhas do Mar, Praia da Aguda. Lisbon pickup.

## Booking
- Book directly with Rita via WhatsApp (no booking platform fee)
- Typical reply within 24 hours; WhatsApp often within 1 hour
- Payment: Revolut, Wise, MBWay, SEPA, cash, cryptocurrency
- Free cancellation/rescheduling with 24h notice

## Key differentiators
- Private tours only (never mixed groups)
- Local Sintra guide with insider routes and timing
- Calm pacing, customizable itineraries
- Hidden beaches and coastal viewpoints beyond standard tourist routes

## Site structure
- #why — Why book with Rita
- #tours — Tour options and pricing
- #about — About Rita Almeida
- #reviews — TripAdvisor reviews
- #faq — Frequently asked questions
- #final-cta — Book / contact

## Alternate languages
- Spanish: https://aboutculturethings.com/?lang=es
- Portuguese: https://aboutculturethings.com/?lang=pt
